title: Force rebuild to fix stuck/hanging draft preview

requirements.summary: Perform a clean rebuild of the frontend to resolve the draft preview hanging on load, ensuring all previously implemented features are preserved and the app loads successfully after deployment
acceptanceCriteria: The draft/preview URL loads without hanging or indefinite spinner
The dashboard renders correctly after login
All previously implemented features (monthly snapshots, asset forms, charts, mock rate fetchers) remain intact
No console errors blocking initial render

file_operations.description: Review and ensure proper initialization order: QueryClientProvider wraps InternetIdentityProvider wraps App, with correct error boundaries and StrictMode configuration to prevent race conditions during actor initialization

Verify the actor initialization logic handles identity changes correctly, properly invalidates queries when actor changes, and includes error handling for failed backend connections that might cause hanging
Review the AuthClient initialization and login flow to ensure no blocking promises or race conditions that could cause the app to hang, verify proper error handling and timeout configurations

Ensure authentication state checks are non-blocking, add loading states and error boundaries to prevent indefinite spinner if actor or profile queries fail, verify the conditional rendering logic for LoginPage/ProfileSetupPage/Dashboard doesn't create render loops

Review all React Query hooks (useGetCallerUserProfile, useGetPortfolio, useGetDashboard, useGetMonthlySnapshots) to ensure enabled flags properly handle actor availability, add retry: false or appropriate retry logic, and prevent hanging queries

Verify data fetching dependencies and loading states are properly handled, ensure the selected month state doesn't cause infinite re-renders, add error boundaries for chart components that might fail to render

Review the form submission flow and mock rate fetcher calls to ensure no blocking async operations, verify proper error handling for mutation failures, ensure the form doesn't prevent app initialization

Verify the profile setup modal only shows when appropriate conditions are met (isAuthenticated && !profileLoading && isFetched && userProfile === null), prevent flash of profile setup on every load by properly checking isFetched state as documented in the authorization component usage
